# Brand Voice & Tone -- Brand Check Test

## Personality Traits

- Professional but approachable
- Clear and direct
- Helpful and empathetic

## Vocabulary

### Approved Terms
- "We" and "you" (first/second person)
- "Start", "Create", "Build" (action verbs)

### Forbidden Terms

| Term | Reason | Preferred Alternative |
|------|--------|-----------------------|
| leverage | Jargon, overused | use |
| synergize | Jargon, meaningless | combine |
| utilize | Overly formal | use |
| paradigm | Overused, vague | approach, model |

## Grammar & Formatting

- **Case:** Sentence case for UI
- **Voice:** Active voice
- **Contractions:** Allowed
- **Sentence length:** Short to medium (15-25 words ideal)
